meta.title: Rhythmic Gymnastics Club Management Software in Colombia | Zaltyko - FCG
meta.description: Manage your federated rhythmic gymnastics club with Zaltyko. Full control over athletes, categories, levels 1-10, 5 apparatus and FCG licenses.

hero.headline: Manage your federated rhythmic gymnastics club with ease
hero.subheadline: Full control over FCG athletes, official categories, levels 1-10, 5 apparatus and licenses. Copa Colombia and national selectivos.

painPoints.generic: Managing federations and equipment for 5 apparatus on paper is chaos. Little time for training due to excess paperwork.
painPoints.specific: Renewing FCG licenses, managing equipment (ropes, hoops, balls, clubs, ribbons), tracking technical levels 1-10.
